title: Hanuman Mantra
intro: Powerful mantras dedicated to Lord Hanuman for strength, courage and freedom from fear.
description:
|| Hanuman Mantra ||
Om Ham Hanumate Namah.
Om Shri Hanumate Namah.
Manojavam Maruttulyavegam jitendriyam buddhimataam varishtham.
Vaataatmajam vaanarayoothamukhyam Shriraamadootam sharanam prapadye.
meaning: These mantras are chanted for strength, fearlessness and spiritual growth.

faq.q1: How many times should I chant the mantra?
faq.a1: Traditionally 108 times, but sincere devotion matters most.
faq.q2: When is the best time to chant?
faq.a2: Early morning (Brahma Muhurta) and evening are ideal.
